# Level 8 — The Cursed Battlements
# Hardest standard level. Tests everything:
# - Near-max horizontal gaps (7 tiles) requiring full run speed at jump
# - Enemies placed at gap edges forcing combat near drops
# - Spike beds under every gap — no safety
# - Low ceiling passage (3 tile tall gap, rows 6-8) right before a long jump
# - Alternating platform heights requiring full and short jumps in sequence
# - Vow Stone is at the end after fighting 2 enemies on a 3-tile platform
# Width: 42 cols | Height: 22 rows
